title: AN ACT TO AMEND TITLE 10 AND TITLE 30 OF THE DELAWARE CODE RELATING TO THE UNIFORM ASSIGNMENT FOR BENEFIT OF CREDITORS ACT.

other_titles.title: Uniform Assignment for Benefit of Creditors Act/Adopt/ULC

actions.description: Introduced and Assigned to Judiciary Committee in Senate

Assigned to Judiciary Committee in House

Passed By House. Votes: 31 YES 10 ABSENT
